Container.Name: longbox
Container.Overview: Longbox — a fast, self-hosted, PWA-first server for comics, manga, and digital books, with full OPDS support. A single Rust binary with an embedded SQLite database (no separate database container). On first start it creates its config + database under /config and serves the web app / OPDS on port 10801. Add libraries pointing at folders under /data (your mounted comics/books). The image is public on GHCR — it pulls with no docker login, and each build carries a signed provenance attestation.
Container.Description: Longbox comics/manga/ebook server (PWA-first fork of Stump). Point a library at a folder under /data and browse at IP:10801. Requires no database container.

Config.Name: WebUI port
Config.Description: App HTTP port (web UI + OPDS). On br0, reach it at this IP:10801.

Config.Name: Config / database
Config.Description: Longbox config + SQLite database + thumbnails. Keep on the NVMe cache (appdata).

Config.Name: Library (comics/books)
Config.Description: Your comics/manga/book library root. Inside Longbox, add libraries pointing at folders under /data. Use rw only if you enable writing ComicInfo.xml back into archives; otherwise ro is safer.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID owning /config and /data (Unraid default 99 = nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID owning /config and /data (Unraid default 100 = users).

Config.Name: Trust proxy headers
Config.Description: Set true when Longbox runs behind a reverse proxy (NGINX Proxy Manager, Traefik, Caddy, etc.). Longbox then trusts the X-Forwarded-Proto/-For headers and builds correct https cover, thumbnail, and OPDS URLs. With it false behind a proxy, those URLs point at the internal :10801 port that the proxy can't reach, so covers/thumbnails fail to load. Set false only if you expose Longbox directly by IP:port with no proxy in front.
